title: Japanese Gooey Stir Fry
description: A quick and savory Japanese-inspired stir fry with gooey goodness. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Gooey
ingredients.notes: Gooey sauce of your choice (e.g. teriyaki or oyster sauce)

ingredients.name: Stir
ingredients.notes: Any stir-fry vegetable of your choice (e.g. bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the Spanish rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Pour in the gooey sauce and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until well combined.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with sesame oil and green onions.
